description: Rakhys is a Saudi shopping and price-comparison service focused on electronics and household devices. Its website lists products, deals, and participating stores, and its mobile apps provide the same comparison experience.
summary: Rakhys exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.rakhys.com/mcp` with no authentication; no public developer HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI surfaces were found on `rakhys.com`.
